sections.heading: S
sections.section_value: The patient reports severe pain, primarily in the lower abdomen, which has been ongoing for several weeks. He also reports weight loss and constipation. The patient states he has a history of endometriosis.

sections.heading: O
sections.section_value: Physical exam reveals tenderness to palpation in the lower abdomen. The patient's weight is 130 pounds. Neurological exam is unremarkable. CA-125 is elevated at 250 U/mL.
medical_concepts: tenderness to palpation in the lower abdomen

sections.heading: A
sections.section_value: The patient has ovarian cancer, stage three A, with a history of endometriosis. The elevated CA-125 level supports the diagnosis.

sections.heading: P
sections.section_value: Order a lymph node dissection. Order a CA-125 test. Order an HCG test. Order an AFP test. Order an LDH test. Arrange for intraperitoneal chemotherapy. Start cisplatin. Administer taxol. Recommend genetic counseling.

medical_concepts: tenderness to palpation in the lower abdomen
